name: npm — react weekly downloads
goal:
Open https://www.npmjs.com/package/react and find the 'Weekly Downloads' number shown on the package page.

Return ONLY a JSON object with EXACTLY this key:
  - "weekly_downloads": the number as a STRING containing only digits and optional commas (e.g. "25,847,392" or "25847392"). Do NOT include the word 'downloads' or any other text.

Example correct output:
  {"weekly_downloads": "25,847,392"}

This number is displayed prominently on the package's main page under the 'Weekly Downloads' label. Complete with EXACTLY this JSON object as your final result.
